vocab.sentence: What time do you get up? I get up at 6:45.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你幾點起床？我六點四十五分起床。

vocab.sentence: I go to school at seven.
When does she have lunch? She has lunch at noon.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 她什麼時候吃午餐？她在中午吃午餐。

vocab.sentence: What time does he do his homework? He does it at 5:30.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他幾點做作業？他五點半做。

vocab.sentence: I take a bath at eight.
What time do you go to bed? I go to bed at ten.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你幾點睡覺？我十點睡覺。

phrases.sentence: What time is it? It's seven o'clock.
Always tell the truth. Honesty is the best policy.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 永遠說實話。誠實是上策。

tips.label: What time do you + 動詞？
tips.text: 詢問「你幾點做某事？」用 What time do you + 動詞？回答用 I + 動詞 + at + 時間。

tips.label: What time does he/she + 動詞？
tips.text: 詢問「他/她幾點做某事？」用 What time does he/she + 動詞原形？回答用 He/She + 動詞(三單) + at + 時間。

notes.title: What time do you + 動詞？（詢問你的日常時間）
notes.rule: What time do you + 動詞原形? I + 動詞原形 + at + 時間.
notes.description: 用 What time do you...? 詢問你幾點做某件事。回答用 I + 動詞 + at + 時間。
examples: What time do you get up? I get up at 6:45.
What time do you go to school? I go to school at seven.
What time do you go to bed? I go to bed at ten.
What time do you go home? I go home at four.

notes.title: What time does he/she + 動詞？（詢問他人的日常時間）
notes.rule: What time does he/she + 動詞原形? He/She + 動詞(三單) + at + 時間.
notes.description: 詢問第三者幾點做某件事。Does 後面跟動詞原形，回答的主句用三單動詞。
examples: What time does she get up? She gets up at seven.
What time does he do his homework? He does his homework at 5:30.
What time does she have lunch? She has lunch at noon.
What time does he go to bed? He goes to bed at nine.

quiz.question: What ___ do you get up? I get up at 6:45.
quiz.hint: 詢問幾點用 What time。

quiz.question: What time do you get up? I ___ up at seven.
quiz.hint: I 後面用動詞原形 get。

quiz.question: What time does she get up? She ___ up at 6:30.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 she，get 加 s → gets。

quiz.question: What time ___ he go to school? He goes at eight.
quiz.hint: 詢問第三人稱單數 he 用 does。

quiz.question: Which phrase means 起床?
quiz.hint: get up = 起床。

quiz.question: What time do you go to bed? I go to bed ___ ten.
quiz.hint: 幾點幾分前用介係詞 at。

quiz.question: What time does he have lunch? He ___ lunch at noon.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 he，have → has。

quiz.question: What time ___ she take a bath? She takes a bath at nine.
quiz.hint: 詢問第三人稱單數 she 用 does。

quiz.question: Which phrase means 去睡覺?
quiz.hint: go to bed = 去睡覺。

quiz.question: I go to school ___ 7:30.
quiz.hint: 幾點幾分前用介係詞 at。

quiz.question: What time does he go home? He ___ home at four.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 he，go 加 es → goes。

quiz.question: What time ___ you take a bath? I take a bath at eight.
quiz.hint: 詢問 you 用 do。

quiz.question: Which phrase means 做我的作業?
quiz.hint: do my homework = 做我的作業。

quiz.question: She does her homework ___ 5:30.
quiz.hint: 幾點幾分前用介係詞 at。

quiz.question: What time does she go to bed? She ___ to bed at ten.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 she，go 加 es → goes。

quiz.question: What time ___ you go home? I go home at four.
quiz.hint: 詢問 you 用 do。

quiz.question: Which phrase means 吃午餐?
quiz.hint: have lunch = 吃午餐。

quiz.question: He ___ up at 6:45 every day.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 he，get 加 s → gets。

quiz.question: What time ___ he do his homework? He does it at five.
quiz.hint: 詢問第三人稱單數 he 用 does。

quiz.question: I take a bath ___ eight o'clock.
quiz.hint: 幾點幾分前用介係詞 at。

quiz.question: Which phrase means 回家?
quiz.hint: go home = 回家。

quiz.question: She ___ lunch at noon.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 she，have → has。

quiz.question: What time ___ she go to school? She goes at 7:30.
quiz.hint: 詢問第三人稱單數 she 用 does。

quiz.question: What time do you do your homework? I do my homework ___ five.
quiz.hint: 幾點幾分前用介係詞 at。

quiz.question: Which phrase means 洗澡?
quiz.hint: take a bath = 洗澡。

quiz.question: He ___ to bed at nine.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 he，go 加 es → goes。

quiz.question: What time ___ you get up? I get up at six.
quiz.hint: 詢問 you 用 do。

quiz.question: What time does she take a bath? She ___ a bath at eight.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 she，take 加 s → takes。

quiz.question: Which phrase means 去上學?
quiz.hint: go to school = 去上學。

quiz.question: She ___ to school at 7:30.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 she，go 加 es → goes。

quiz.question: What time ___ he get up? He gets up at six.
quiz.hint: 詢問第三人稱單數 he 用 does。

quiz.question: 「你幾點起床？我六點四十五分起床。」英文是？
options: A. What time do you get up? I get up at 6:45.
B. What time does you get up? I get up at 6:45.
C. What time do you get up? She gets up at 6:45.
D. What time do you wake up? I get up at 6:45.
quiz.hint: What time do you get up? I get up at 6:45.

quiz.hint: go to bed = 去睡覺。

options: A. What time does he do his homework? He does it at 5:30.
